changeSet.author: cinex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.check_constraints WHERE name = 'chk_seats_type'

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE seats DROP CONSTRAINT chk_seats_type;

changeSet.author: cinex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.check_constraints WHERE name = 'chk_seats_status'

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE seats DROP CONSTRAINT chk_seats_status;

changeSet.author: cinex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.check_constraints WHERE name = 'CK_seats_seat_type'

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE seats DROP CONSTRAINT CK_seats_seat_type;

changeSet.author: cinex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.check_constraints WHERE name = 'CK_seats_status'

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE seats DROP CONSTRAINT CK_seats_status;

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE seats ADD CONSTRAINT chk_seats_type CHECK (seat_type IN ('STANDARD','VIP','COUPLE','SWEETBOX','DELUXE','HANDICAP'));

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE seats ADD CONSTRAINT chk_seats_status CHECK (status IN ('AVAILABLE','BROKEN','BLOCKED'));
